text.title: Verbatim To Eval Row Recipe Core Rules
text.summary: 5 testable rules every Verbatim To Eval Row Recipe application MUST enforce. HARD rules — user-supplied input cannot override them.

rule.statement: Every eval row pins the source verbatim (ticket id / message id / transcript id) with a verifiable link.

rationale.source: Verbatim To Eval Row Recipe authoring evidence + websearch 2026-05

rule.rationale: Without source pin, eval rows drift away from the real failure they're meant to regress.

rule.statement: Row is deduplicated against the existing eval set before landing; near-duplicates fold into an existing row's variants list.

rationale.source: Verbatim To Eval Row Recipe authoring evidence + websearch 2026-05

rule.rationale: Eval-set bloat with near-duplicates dilutes signal; dedup keeps the set diagnostic.

rule.statement: Row carries severity (blocker / regression / nice-to-have) from a closed taxonomy.

rationale.source: Verbatim To Eval Row Recipe authoring evidence + websearch 2026-05

rule.rationale: Open severity strings collapse meaning; closed taxonomy makes the row sortable.

rule.statement: Row names the labeller (handle / email); labels reviewed by a second human for blocker severity.

rationale.source: Verbatim To Eval Row Recipe authoring evidence + websearch 2026-05

rule.rationale: Unnamed labels accumulate bias; second-review on blockers catches errors at the highest-cost tier.

rule.statement: Verbatim → eval row lands within 1 working day; older verbatims trigger a backlog alert.

rationale.source: Verbatim To Eval Row Recipe authoring evidence + websearch 2026-05

rule.rationale: Multi-week lag detaches eval set from production; the 1-day floor matches typical incident cadence.

section.title: Conclusion targets used by the decision tree

rule.statement: Run the full procedure; emit an artefact passing the output contract.
rule.rationale: Terminal target used by 06-decision-tree when preconditions hold.

rule.statement: Skip; surface the missing precondition; do not synthesize.
rule.rationale: Terminal target used by 06-decision-tree when preconditions fail.
